original_image_tags: The page is a dark, high-contrast photocopy of a typed checklist form. A large "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp is faintly visible at the top center. Another large, fainter "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp is visible in the lower half, partially obscured by text. The page has two punch holes on the left margin. A small handwritten number "57" is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typed checklist titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' detailing Incident #128, dated 8 May 1948. The form contains 26 numbered fields with typed entries. The document features two 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps (one at the top, one in the middle-right) and a handwritten number '57' at the bottom right. There are two hole-punch marks on the left margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual elements: a typed checklist form, two 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps, two hole-punch marks, and a handwritten '57'.
